name: AC/DC
bio: AC/DC's catalog keeps earning because the band's biggest riffs remain deeply embedded in sports media, rock playlists, and global licensing culture.
notable_for: One of the most durable hard-rock catalogs ever recorded.
career_highlight: Back in Black remains a core long-tail rock album with unusually strong replay and sync value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps AC/DC's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: AC/DC's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
